case_title: POTTER, TIM VS LUI, KAM TIN C/O RASKIN REAL ESTATE INC. et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF POTTER, TIM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUI, KAM TIN C/O RASKIN REAL ESTATE INC. RASKIN REAL ESTATE INC. $3,610.00 PRINCIPAL, $47.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,657.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT LUI, KAM TIN C/O RASKIN REAL ESTATE INC. RASKIN REAL ESTATE INC.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-19-2001, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO DEC-06-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $55.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT LUI, KAM TIN C/O RASKIN REAL ESTATE INC. RASKIN REAL ESTATE INC.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LUI, KAM TIN C/O RASKIN REAL ESTATE INC.

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $3,751.53 AS TO DEFENDANT LUI, KAM TIN C/O RASKIN REAL ESTATE INC. RASKIN REAL ESTATE INC.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,610.00 FILED BY POTTER, TIM AS TO DEFENDANT LUI, KAM TIN C/O RASKIN REAL ESTATE INC. RASKIN REAL ESTATE INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-19-2001 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
